site.title: Themadhood's Music
site.tagline: Original music releases and audio projects under Themadhood Media.
site.metaDescription: Themadhood's Music is the music branch under Themadhood Media, focused on original releases and audio projects.

footer.title: Themadhood's Music
footer.line2: Themadhood's Music operates under Themadhood Media.

hero.headline: Themadhood's Music
body: Themadhood's Music is the music division within Themadhood Media, focused on original releases and audio projects.
It exists to create, organize, and distribute music while keeping releases connected to the broader Themadhood ecosystem.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: Themadhood's Music is built to support consistent releases, clear project organization, and long-term accessibility across platforms.
When music projects do not maintain their own public presence, updates and releases can route through the parent media structure while still keeping attribution clear.

contact.title: CONNECT WITH US
contact.note: GitHub Pages is static-only. If you want submissions, wire this up to Formspree/Netlify Forms later.
